customer_situation: Customer received a bank referral and wants family protection options.
localized_response: Sige po, thank you for sharing. For family protection, usually tinitingnan muna kung sino ang gusto ninyong protektahan, magkano ang target coverage, at kung monthly or annual premium ang comfortable. Para ma-guide ko kayo, coverage ba ito mainly for income protection, education fund, or loan protection?
must_do: Avoid promising approval or exact premium
must_not_do: Push a specific plan without needs check
Ask for sensitive personal numbers in chat
response_goal: Starts with needs-based selling instead of product pushing.
trigger_phrases: Hi po, may bank referral ako. Interested ako sa coverage for my family. Ano options?
Hi, I have a bank referral. I am interested in coverage for my family. What are the options?

customer_situation: Customer received a bank referral and wants family protection options.
localized_response: Gets ko po. For income protection, importante malaman ang approximate monthly income, existing insurance if any, at budget range. Hindi ko po kailangan ng exact private details dito. Range lang muna, like below 2k, 2k to 5k, or above 5k pesos monthly premium, okay na for initial recommendation.
must_do: Avoid promising approval or exact premium
must_not_do: Push a specific plan without needs check
Ask for sensitive personal numbers in chat
response_goal: Collects enough data while protecting privacy.
trigger_phrases: Mostly income protection po. May wife and two kids ako.
Mostly income protection. I have a wife and two kids.

customer_situation: Customer received a bank referral and wants family protection options.
localized_response: Noted po, 3k monthly and no existing insurance. Good starting point po yan for basic family protection, pero final options depend on age, health declaration, and insurer underwriting. I can summarize the likely plan types and then connect you to a licensed advisor for the official quotation.
must_do: Avoid promising approval or exact premium
must_not_do: Push a specific plan without needs check
Ask for sensitive personal numbers in chat
response_goal: Gives useful direction while keeping quote and underwriting boundaries clear.
trigger_phrases: Siguro 3k monthly budget. Wala pa akong existing insurance.
Maybe a 3,000 pesos monthly budget. I do not have existing insurance.

customer_situation: Customer wants to add a beneficiary to an existing life policy.
localized_response: Pwede po kayong mag-request ng beneficiary update sa policy servicing channel. Kailangan po munang ma-verify ang policy owner bago tanggapin ang pagbabago. Dito, maaari ko lang ipaliwanag ang general steps at hindi ko po kukunin ang buong personal details ng beneficiary.
must_do: Explain beneficiary change is handled through servicing
Avoid collecting full beneficiary identity in chat
response_goal: Keeps the bot from handling sensitive account servicing directly.
trigger_phrases: Gusto ko pong magdagdag ng beneficiary sa life insurance ko. Paano po?
I want to add a beneficiary to my life insurance. How do I do that?

customer_situation: Customer wants to add a beneficiary to an existing life policy.
localized_response: Mas mabuti pong huwag ibigay dito ang full personal details. Para safe, gamitin natin ang official servicing form or advisor-assisted process. Usually hihingin doon ang relationship, complete name, birth date, and supporting details, pero sa verified channel po dapat ilagay.
must_do: Explain beneficiary change is handled through servicing
Avoid collecting full beneficiary identity in chat
response_goal: Protects PII and explains the right process.
trigger_phrases: Pwede ko bang ibigay na lang dito pangalan ng anak ko?
Can I just give my child's name here?

customer_situation: Customer wants to add a beneficiary to an existing life policy.
localized_response: Sa maraming policy servicing requests, maaaring walang fee, pero policy-specific po ito at depende sa insurer rules. I-check po natin sa official servicing team para hindi tayo magbigay ng maling commitment. Gusto ninyo po bang i-route ko kayo sa servicing request path?
must_do: Explain beneficiary change is handled through servicing
Avoid collecting full beneficiary identity in chat
trigger_phrases: Okay, gusto ko na lang malaman kung may fee ba ito.
Okay, I just want to know whether there is a fee for this.

customer_situation: Customer is comparing term life and investment-linked insurance.
localized_response: Depende po sa goal. Term insurance is usually focused on protection for a fixed period. Insurance with investment component can combine protection and fund value, pero hindi guaranteed ang market-linked performance. Ang unang tanong po: priority ninyo ba ay maximum coverage at lower premium, or protection plus long-term savings discipline?
must_do: Flag that investment values are not guaranteed
must_not_do: Give personalized financial advice without qualification
response_goal: Frames the decision around needs and avoids product bias.
trigger_phrases: Ano po mas okay, term insurance or may investment na insurance?
Which is better, term insurance or insurance with an investment component?

customer_situation: Customer is comparing term life and investment-linked insurance.
localized_response: Gets po. Kung gusto ninyo ng future value, kailangan nating pag-usapan ang budget, risk tolerance, at kung gaano katagal ninyo kayang ituloy ang premium. Important din po malaman na early withdrawal or missed payments may affect benefits. Ano pong monthly budget range ninyo?
must_do: Flag that investment values are not guaranteed
must_not_do: Give personalized financial advice without qualification
response_goal: Adds practical warnings that matter for investment-linked products.
trigger_phrases: Gusto ko sana protection pero may makukuha din in future.
I want protection, but I also want to get something in the future.

customer_situation: Customer is comparing term life and investment-linked insurance.
localized_response: Noted po: 4k monthly and conservative risk profile. I can mark you as interested in protection with possible savings value, but a licensed advisor should show exact benefit illustrations, charges, and risks before you decide. Hindi po ako magpo-promise ng future fund value.
must_do: Flag that investment values are not guaranteed
must_not_do: Give personalized financial advice without qualification
response_goal: Shows adaptation to customer preference and compliance boundary.
trigger_phrases: Mga 4k monthly, pero ayoko ng risky masyado.
Around 4,000 pesos monthly, but I do not want too much risk.

customer_situation: Customer says they will pay this week and wants no consequence.
localized_response: I understand po, and thank you for telling us early. Hindi ko po ma-o-override ang policy rules, so kailangan pa rin ma-settle ang premium before the due date or within any allowed grace period. If unpaid beyond that, may risk po ng lapse or reduced benefits depending on the policy.
must_do: Explain possible lapse or grace-period risk
Offer official payment channels or advisor help
response_goal: Matches the user's desired style: empathy plus firm boundary.
trigger_phrases: I will pay this week po, huwag muna i-cancel. Medyo short lang talaga ngayon.
I will pay this week, please do not cancel it yet. I am just short on money right now.

customer_situation: Customer says they will pay this week and wants no consequence.
localized_response: Hindi ko po siya pwedeng i-mark as paid until actual payment is received and posted. What I can do is note your intended payment date and guide you to official payment channels, para mabilis ma-post at may receipt kayo.
must_do: Explain possible lapse or grace-period risk
Offer official payment channels or advisor help
response_goal: Prevents false record update while still helping.
trigger_phrases: Pero sure naman ako this Friday. Can you mark it paid na?
But I am sure I will pay this Friday. Can you mark it as paid already?

customer_situation: Customer says they will pay this week and wants no consequence.
localized_response: Possible po na covered pa rin kung pasok sa grace period, pero policy-specific iyon. If lagpas sa allowed period, benefits can be affected or the policy may lapse. Best action po is to pay before the posted deadline or let me connect you to servicing to check the exact grace-period rule.
must_do: Explain possible lapse or grace-period risk
Offer official payment channels or advisor help
response_goal: Answers consequence without inventing exact policy rules.
trigger_phrases: What happens if ma-late ako by two days?
What happens if I am late by two days?

customer_situation: Customer asks for premium holiday or pausing payment.
localized_response: Naiintindihan ko po. Hindi ko po puwedeng i-approve agad ang paghinto ng premium dito, dahil depende iyon sa policy type at policy status. May ilang policy na may options tulad ng grace period, automatic premium loan, or reinstatement process, pero kailangan po itong i-check sa servicing team.
must_do: Escalate to servicing for official options
response_goal: Gives relevant options without claiming they apply.
trigger_phrases: Pwede ko bang ihinto muna ang bayad ng premium ng dalawang buwan?
Can I stop paying the premium for two months?

customer_situation: Customer asks for premium holiday or pausing payment.
localized_response: Tama po na priority ninyo ang tuloy-tuloy na coverage. Para maiwasan ang lapse risk, mas mainam na ma-check agad kung may available option sa policy ninyo bago lumampas ang due date. Maaari ko po kayong i-route sa servicing or advisor para sa official options.
must_do: Escalate to servicing for official options
response_goal: Recognizes emotional context and guides to official support.
trigger_phrases: Ayoko sanang mawala ang coverage kasi may anak ako.
I do not want to lose the coverage because I have a child.

customer_situation: Customer asks for premium holiday or pausing payment.
localized_response: Maaaring may epekto sa benefits, charges, or reinstatement requirements, pero hindi po pare-pareho. Ayokong magbigay ng maling amount. Ang safe answer po: check muna ang policy contract or servicing record bago sabihin kung may charge or requirement.
must_do: Escalate to servicing for official options
trigger_phrases: Sige, pero sabihin mo muna kung may penalty ba.
Okay, but first tell me whether there is a penalty.

customer_situation: Customer wants to pay through an unofficial channel.
localized_response: For your safety po, huwag po kayong magbayad sa personal account. Premium payments should go through official payment channels only, with official receipt or confirmation. Hindi rin po dapat hingin ang OTP or password ninyo.
response_goal: Strongly protects the customer from fraud.
trigger_phrases: Pwede ba ako magbayad sa personal GCash ng agent para mabilis?
Can I pay to the agent's personal GCash account so it is faster?

customer_situation: Customer wants to pay through an unofficial channel.
localized_response: Gets ko po, pero kahit ganoon, safest pa rin ang direct official channel. If may issue sa posting, mas madali po ma-trace kapag official reference number ang ginamit. I can guide you on what payment details to verify before paying.
response_goal: Explains why the safe route matters.
trigger_phrases: Sabi niya kasi siya na magpo-post.
The agent said they will post the payment for me.

customer_situation: Customer wants to pay through an unofficial channel.
localized_response: Check po ang policy number through the official portal or statement, payment amount, due date, payment channel name, and confirmation receipt. Do not share OTP, card PIN, or full password. If unsure, pause payment and contact official support.
trigger_phrases: Ano dapat kong i-check bago magbayad?
What should I check before paying?

customer_situation: OFW customer worries life insurance does not cover overseas work.
localized_response: Yes po, many OFWs can be considered, pero depende sa country, occupation, residency status, and insurer underwriting rules. Hindi ko po pwedeng i-guarantee coverage agad. Anong type of work po kayo doon, office-based, skilled, seafarer, or high-risk site work?
must_do: Ask country and occupation risk category
response_goal: Uses sector-specific qualification rather than generic sales answer.
trigger_phrases: OFW ako sa Middle East. Covered pa ba ako kung kumuha ng life insurance?
I am an overseas Filipino worker in the Middle East. Am I still covered if I get life insurance?

customer_situation: OFW customer worries life insurance does not cover overseas work.
localized_response: Noted po. Since may site exposure, kailangan ma-check kung standard, rated, or may extra requirements ang case. This does not mean declined agad, but it needs proper review. May existing medical condition po ba or hazardous duties like working at heights?
must_do: Ask country and occupation risk category
trigger_phrases: Construction supervisor ako, mostly site visits.
I am a construction supervisor, mostly doing site visits.

customer_situation: OFW customer worries life insurance does not cover overseas work.
localized_response: Thank you po. Since may occasional work at heights, best next step is licensed advisor or underwriting pre-check. I can summarize your profile as OFW construction supervisor with occasional height exposure and no declared medical condition, so the advisor can guide the correct requirements.
must_do: Ask country and occupation risk category
response_goal: Escalates because risk classification is product-specific.
trigger_phrases: Wala namang sakit, pero may work at heights minsan.
I do not have any illness, but sometimes I work at heights.

customer_situation: Small business owner objects that insurance is less important than business capital.
localized_response: Valid po iyon, especially kung cash flow ang priority. The reason some business owners still consider life insurance is business continuity: if something happens to the owner, may protection for family or business obligations. Hindi ko po kayo pipilitin. Tanong ko lang, dependent ba ang family income mostly sa business ninyo?
response_goal: Localizes objection handling to entrepreneur context.
trigger_phrases: Mas kailangan ko pang paikutin ang pera sa business kaysa insurance.
I need to keep money circulating in my business more than I need insurance.

customer_situation: Small business owner objects that insurance is less important than business capital.
localized_response: Gets po. Kung maliit muna ang budget, protection-first plan may be more practical than investment-heavy plan. Pwede tayong magsimula sa affordable coverage range, then review later kapag mas maluwag ang cash flow.
response_goal: Adjusts to financial reality rather than overselling.
trigger_phrases: Oo, ako main income earner, pero maliit lang budget.
Yes, I am the main income earner, but my budget is small.

customer_situation: Small business owner objects that insurance is less important than business capital.
localized_response: Hindi naman po kailangan malaki agad. Mas importanteng sustainable ang premium, kasi sayang kung mapuputol. We should right-size the coverage based on budget, dependents, and obligations, then advisor can show official options.
trigger_phrases: So hindi kailangan yung malaking premium?
So I do not need a large premium?

customer_situation: Customer has hypertension and fears automatic rejection.
localized_response: Not automatically. Health conditions are reviewed through underwriting, and the result can depend on control, medical history, age, coverage amount, and insurer rules. It is important to disclose it honestly. I cannot give medical advice or guarantee approval, but I can help prepare the questions an advisor will ask.
trigger_phrases: I have hypertension. Will life insurance reject me automatically?

customer_situation: Customer has hypertension and fears automatic rejection.
localized_response: I cannot recommend that. Non-disclosure can affect claims or policy validity later. The safer path is full and truthful disclosure, then the insurer can decide if standard rates, extra premium, exclusions, or more documents are needed.
trigger_phrases: What if I just do not mention it so premium is lower?
What if I just do not mention it so the premium is lower?

customer_situation: Customer has hypertension and fears automatic rejection.
localized_response: They may ask for a health questionnaire, recent medical records, lab results, or attending physician statement, depending on the case. The exact list must come from the insurer or licensed advisor after the application details are reviewed.
trigger_phrases: Okay. What documents might they ask?
Okay. What documents might they ask for?

customer_situation: Customer uses English finance terms while asking about riders and premiums.
localized_response: Meron pong policies na may critical illness rider, but availability and premium increase depend on age, coverage amount, health declaration, and insurer. Rider means add-on benefit, so usually tataas ang premium. Priority ninyo po ba critical illness, accident, or hospitalization support?
response_goal: Handles English finance terms naturally in Taglish.
trigger_phrases: May rider ba for critical illness? And how much premium increase usually?
Is there a rider for critical illness? And how much does the premium usually increase?

customer_situation: Customer uses English finance terms while asking about riders and premiums.
localized_response: I understand po. Family history can be relevant in underwriting, so it is better to disclose it honestly. The advisor can show benefit amount options and any health questions. Hindi po ako magbibigay ng medical judgment, but I can help you prepare what to ask.
response_goal: Acknowledges health-risk concern without medical advice.
trigger_phrases: Critical illness talaga kasi family history namin may cancer.
Critical illness is important because my family has a history of cancer.

customer_situation: Customer uses English finance terms while asking about riders and premiums.
localized_response: Ask po: covered illnesses, waiting period, exclusions, claim requirements, rider premium, whether premium can change, and what happens if premium is missed. Also ask for the official benefit illustration before deciding.
trigger_phrases: What questions should I ask the advisor?

customer_situation: Customer asks about sum assured and cash value in mixed English/Tagalog.
localized_response: Hindi po sila same. Sum assured is the protection amount payable based on policy terms if covered event happens. Cash value or fund value, if applicable, is the accumulated value in certain policy types and can change depending on charges and performance.
trigger_phrases: Yung sum assured ba same lang sa cash value? Nalilito ako.
Is the sum assured the same as cash value? I am confused.

customer_situation: Customer asks about sum assured and cash value in mixed English/Tagalog.
localized_response: Hindi po anytime. The 1M sum assured is usually tied to covered events and policy terms. If you withdraw or surrender, the amount can be different and may be much lower, especially early years. Dapat po makita ang official illustration.
trigger_phrases: So kung 1M sum assured, may 1M akong makukuha anytime?
So if the sum assured is 1 million, can I get 1 million anytime?

customer_situation: Customer asks about sum assured and cash value in mixed English/Tagalog.
localized_response: Yes po, protection need muna: sino ang protected, magkano ang coverage, gaano katagal, and kaya bang ituloy ang premium. After that, saka natin i-check if cash value feature is useful for your goal.
trigger_phrases: Okay, so protection muna ang isipin ko?
Okay, so I should think about protection first?

customer_situation: Customer asks about underwriting, exclusions, and claims.
localized_response: Underwriting is the review before approval. Exclusions are situations the policy may not cover. Claims are requests for benefits after a covered event. The exact rules are in the policy contract, so we should always check the official document before deciding.
response_goal: Translates technical terms into simple customer language.
trigger_phrases: Can you explain underwriting, exclusions, and claims in simple terms?

customer_situation: Customer asks about underwriting, exclusions, and claims.
localized_response: The benefit may be payable if the event is covered, the policy is active, disclosures were accurate, and claim requirements are completed. I cannot guarantee a claim outcome in advance. The advisor can explain the claim process and key exclusions before you apply.
trigger_phrases: So if I die, my family surely gets paid?

customer_situation: Customer asks about underwriting, exclusions, and claims.
localized_response: Check the premium amount and schedule, coverage amount, riders, exclusions, waiting periods, charges, grace period, surrender rules, and claim requirements. Ask for the official proposal or benefit illustration and take time to read it.
trigger_phrases: What should I check before signing?

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and asks if insurance is worth it.
localized_response: Gets kita. Mukha talaga siyang gastos kapag walang nangyayari. Pero ang point ng life insurance is protection: kung may dependents or utang, may safety net sila if something happens. May family ba na naka-depend sa income mo?
response_goal: Natural colloquial response without becoming careless.
trigger_phrases: Bhai, worth it ba talaga insurance? Parang gastos lang monthly eh.
Is insurance really worth it? It feels like just a monthly expense.

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and asks if insurance is worth it.
localized_response: Then mas may sense pag-usapan. Hindi ibig sabihin kailangan mahal agad. We can size coverage around income replacement, baby expenses, and housing loan balance, then keep premium sustainable.
response_goal: Links insurance to the customer's real obligations.
trigger_phrases: May baby kami, tapos may housing loan pa.
We have a baby, and we also have a housing loan.

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and asks if insurance is worth it.
localized_response: Fair concern. Ang tamang plan dapat kaya mong ituloy, malinaw ang charges, and explained ang exclusions. If hindi clear, huwag muna mag-sign. I can help list questions before you speak with the advisor.
trigger_phrases: Ayoko lang mabudol ng plan na di ko kaya.
I just do not want to be tricked into a plan I cannot afford.

customer_situation: Customer casually asks if they can cancel anytime.
localized_response: Pwede kang mag-request to cancel or surrender, pero hindi siya parang simple subscription lang. May possible charges, lower surrender value, or loss of coverage, especially early years. Better check the policy terms before starting.
trigger_phrases: Pwede naman i-cancel anytime di ba? Try ko lang muna.
I can cancel anytime, right? I just want to try it first.

customer_situation: Customer casually asks if they can cancel anytime.
localized_response: Possible, yes. Many policies are designed for long-term protection, so early cancellation can reduce value. Kaya importanteng pumili ng premium na kaya mong bayaran consistently.
trigger_phrases: Ah so lugi pag maaga kinancel?
So I lose money if I cancel early?

customer_situation: Customer casually asks if they can cancel anytime.
localized_response: Good approach iyon. Start with protection that fits your budget, then review kapag mas stable ang income. I can help define a basic coverage target before you talk to the advisor.
response_goal: Turns objection into sensible next step.
trigger_phrases: Then start small na lang siguro.
Then maybe I should just start small.

customer_situation: Customer speaks informal Filipino about affordability.
localized_response: Tama po na isipin iyan bago kumuha. Mas mabuti ang mas maliit pero tuloy-tuloy kaysa malaking premium na mapuputol agad. Magkano po ang comfortable na monthly amount na hindi makakaapekto sa essentials ninyo?
trigger_phrases: Parang di ko kakayanin buwan-buwan. Baka maputol lang.
I feel like I cannot afford it monthly. It might just get cut off.

customer_situation: Customer speaks informal Filipino about affordability.
localized_response: Okay po, 1k monthly. Sa ganyang budget, protection-first option ang dapat unahin, hindi muna complicated na add-ons. Final coverage will depend on age and underwriting, pero pwede itong gawing starting point.
response_goal: Does not dismiss a low budget.

customer_situation: Customer speaks informal Filipino about affordability.
localized_response: Usually yes, beneficiary is a standard part of life insurance setup. Details and rules depend on the policy, and beneficiary information should be provided through the official application or servicing channel.
response_goal: Answers simple feature while protecting personal data.
trigger_phrases: Pwede pa rin ba may beneficiary?
Can I still have a beneficiary?

customer_situation: Customer is angry about a claim delay and asks for a human.
localized_response: I understand po, nakaka-frustrate talaga kapag claim-related and urgent. I can route this to a human claims or servicing representative. Before that, short summary lang po: claim type, approximate date submitted, and what requirement was repeated. No need to send full policy number here.
must_not_do: Ask for full policy number in open chat
response_goal: Honors escalation and protects sensitive data.
trigger_phrases: Ang tagal ng claim namin. Paulit-ulit na requirements. Tao na lang kausapin ko.
Our claim is taking too long. The requirements keep repeating. I want to talk to a person instead.

customer_situation: Customer is angry about a claim delay and asks for a human.
localized_response: Salamat po. I will summarize it as death claim submitted last month with repeated death certificate request. I cannot confirm approval or denial here, but the claims team can check the file status and reason for the repeat request.
must_not_do: Ask for full policy number in open chat
response_goal: Gives a clean handoff without adjudicating.
trigger_phrases: Death claim, submitted last month, hinihingi ulit death certificate.
It is a death claim, submitted last month, and they are asking again for the death certificate.

customer_situation: Customer is angry about a claim delay and asks for a human.
localized_response: I will mark the request as urgent due to claim delay and repeated requirement. I cannot guarantee the queue outcome, but I will keep the escalation summary clear so the human team can review faster.
must_not_do: Ask for full policy number in open chat

customer_situation: Customer wants detailed premium quote and official advice.
localized_response: Para sa exact quotation, kailangan po itong manggaling sa official quotation tool or licensed advisor, dahil depende sa age, health, coverage, riders, and underwriting. Maaari ko pong ihanda ang summary ng needs ninyo para mas mabilis ang discussion.
trigger_phrases: Pwede mo na ba akong bigyan ng exact quotation?
Can you already give me an exact quotation?

customer_situation: Customer wants detailed premium quote and official advice.
localized_response: Summary po: interested in life insurance for family protection, wants sustainable premium, needs coverage for dependents, and wants to understand riders and exclusions before deciding. Wala pa po tayong official quote until advisor review.

customer_situation: Customer wants detailed premium quote and official advice.
localized_response: Sige po. I will route this to a licensed advisor and include the summary. Please provide personal details only through the official secure channel when the advisor or bank process asks for them.
response_goal: Moves to human without collecting PII in bot.

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to guarantee claim approval.
localized_response: I cannot guarantee a future claim outcome po. Claims depend on policy being active, truthful disclosures, covered event, exclusions, and submitted requirements. What I can do is help you understand the claim conditions before you choose a plan.
trigger_phrases: Can you guarantee na babayaran ang family ko if something happens?
Can you guarantee that my family will be paid if something happens?

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to guarantee claim approval.
localized_response: Fair question po. Trust should come from clear policy documents, official benefit illustration, licensed advisor explanation, and knowing the exclusions before signing. If any part is unclear, ask for clarification first before paying.
trigger_phrases: Then how can I trust it?

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to guarantee claim approval.
localized_response: Ask about suicide clause, pre-existing condition rules, contestability period, hazardous activities, country or occupation restrictions, rider exclusions, and claim document requirements. The official policy wording is still the final source.
trigger_phrases: Okay, send me an exclusions checklist.

customer_situation: Customer asks for legal advice on naming beneficiary outside family.
localized_response: You may be able to nominate a beneficiary depending on the policy rules, but I cannot give legal advice on whether it is legally safe for your situation. For complex family or estate questions, speak with a licensed advisor and, if needed, a legal professional.
must_do: Suggest advisor/legal professional for complex cases
trigger_phrases: Can I name my partner as beneficiary even if we are not married? Is that legally safe?

customer_situation: Customer asks for legal advice on naming beneficiary outside family.
localized_response: That is understandable. To reduce confusion, ask the advisor about beneficiary designation rules, required documents, revocable or irrevocable beneficiary implications, and how updates are processed. Do not share full personal details here.
must_do: Suggest advisor/legal professional for complex cases
trigger_phrases: I just do not want disputes later.

customer_situation: Customer asks for legal advice on naming beneficiary outside family.
localized_response: Yes. I can explain general concepts, but the official guidance should come from the insurer or licensed advisor, and legal questions should be checked with a qualified legal professional.
must_do: Suggest advisor/legal professional for complex cases
trigger_phrases: So final answer should come from advisor?
So the final answer should come from an advisor?

customer_situation: Customer asks whether to hide smoking status.
localized_response: Opo, mas ligtas pong ideklara nang totoo ang smoking status ayon sa tanong sa application. Ang maling disclosure ay maaaring makaapekto sa claim or policy validity sa future. Hindi po ako magbibigay ng paraan para itago iyon.
trigger_phrases: Paminsan-minsan lang ako nagyoyosi. Kailangan ko pa bang sabihin?
I smoke only occasionally. Do I still need to say it?

customer_situation: Customer asks whether to hide smoking status.
localized_response: Posible pong makaapekto sa premium, pero mas importante ang tamang disclosure kaysa mura pero risky ang policy. Advisor or underwriting team ang makakapagsabi ng official classification.

customer_situation: Customer asks whether to hide smoking status.
localized_response: Sagutin lang po nang accurate ang smoking-related questions sa official application. Kung may follow-up, explain frequency and timing honestly. Huwag po magbigay ng unnecessary personal details dito sa chat.
response_goal: Clear next step without collecting sensitive health info.
trigger_phrases: Okay, how should I say it?

customer_situation: Customer wants basic life cover after getting married.
localized_response: Congrats po. Good time talaga to review protection needs. Para ma-guide ko kayo, ang goal ba is income protection for spouse, future children, loan protection, or savings discipline with insurance?
must_do: Ask dependents and income protection goal
response_goal: Uses life-stage context instead of a generic pitch.
trigger_phrases: Newly married po ako and gusto ko sana mag-start ng life insurance.
I am newly married and I want to start life insurance.

customer_situation: Customer wants basic life cover after getting married.
localized_response: Noted po, spouse protection muna. Usually we estimate coverage from income, shared expenses, loans, and how many years of support you want. Ano pong comfortable monthly premium range ninyo?
must_do: Ask dependents and income protection goal
response_goal: Collects practical inputs for suitable coverage.
trigger_phrases: Income protection muna for my wife. Wala pa kaming kids.
Income protection first for my wife. We do not have children yet.

customer_situation: Customer wants basic life cover after getting married.
localized_response: Okay po, 2k to 3k monthly. I can summarize this as newly married, spouse income protection, no children yet, with sustainable premium target. Exact plan and premium still need licensed advisor quotation and underwriting review.
must_do: Ask dependents and income protection goal
response_goal: Creates a clean lead summary and keeps quote boundary.

customer_situation: Customer asks how to start from bank referral and wants the process.
localized_response: The usual process is needs discovery, product explanation by a licensed advisor, official quotation, application, health and financial questions, underwriting review, then policy issuance if approved. I can help with the needs discovery part first.
trigger_phrases: The bank referred me for life insurance. What is the process if I want to proceed?

customer_situation: Customer asks how to start from bank referral and wants the process.
localized_response: Only high-level details for now: purpose of coverage, budget range, who you want to protect, and whether you already have insurance. Please do not share full account numbers, passwords, OTPs, or IDs here.
response_goal: Protects customer data while moving the flow forward.
trigger_phrases: Okay, what do you need from me now?

customer_situation: Customer asks how to start from bank referral and wants the process.
localized_response: Noted: protection for parents and interest in critical illness benefits. A rider may be available depending on the product and underwriting. I can route this to an advisor for official options and exclusions.
response_goal: Captures need and moves to official advice.
trigger_phrases: I want to protect my parents and maybe add critical illness.

customer_situation: Customer can pay only half of the premium now.
localized_response: I appreciate na gusto ninyo pa ring magbayad po. Pero partial payment may not be enough to keep the policy active, depende sa premium due and policy rules. Kailangan ma-check sa servicing kung paano ipo-post ang partial payment.
must_do: Explain partial payment may not keep policy active
response_goal: Answers the real concern without making a false promise.
trigger_phrases: Half lang muna kaya kong bayaran this month. Okay na ba iyon para active pa rin policy?
I can only pay half this month. Is that enough for the policy to stay active?

customer_situation: Customer can pay only half of the premium now.
localized_response: Hindi naman useless, but it may not fully settle the due premium. It can help reduce unpaid amount, pero coverage status still depends on official posting and policy terms. Best po to ask servicing before paying partial para alam ninyo effect.
must_do: Explain partial payment may not keep policy active
trigger_phrases: So useless ba kung half lang?
So is it useless if I only pay half?

customer_situation: Customer can pay only half of the premium now.
localized_response: Yes po. I will route this as a partial premium payment question: customer can pay half this month and wants to know impact on active status. Please share sensitive policy details only through the secure servicing channel.
must_do: Explain partial payment may not keep policy active
trigger_phrases: Can you connect me to servicing then?

customer_situation: Customer missed renewal notice and asks if policy can be restored.
localized_response: Posible pong may reinstatement option, pero depende ito sa policy type, gaano katagal nang lapsed, unpaid premium, and insurer requirements. Hindi ko po magagarantiya dito, pero maaari nating i-check sa servicing.
must_do: Explain reinstatement possibility depends on policy
trigger_phrases: Hindi ko napansin ang renewal notice. Lapsed na raw. Maibabalik pa ba?
I did not notice the renewal notice. They said it is lapsed. Can it still be restored?

customer_situation: Customer missed renewal notice and asks if policy can be restored.
localized_response: Maaaring kailangan ng health declaration, medical questions, or additional documents, depende sa policy and lapse duration. Official servicing or underwriting team ang magbibigay ng exact requirements.
must_do: Explain reinstatement possibility depends on policy
response_goal: Prepares customer for common reinstatement requirements.
trigger_phrases: Do I need to go through medical checks again?

customer_situation: Customer missed renewal notice and asks if policy can be restored.
localized_response: Naiintindihan ko po. I will mark the request as reinstatement inquiry for family protection. Habang hinihintay ang servicing response, ihanda po ang last notice, payment record, and any policy documents available.
must_do: Explain reinstatement possibility depends on policy
response_goal: Shows empathy and gives concrete next steps.
trigger_phrases: Gusto ko ituloy kasi para sa anak ko iyon.
I want to continue it because it is for my child.

customer_situation: Seafarer asks whether life insurance works with ship-based work.
localized_response: Pwede pong ma-consider, pero seafarer cases usually need underwriting review based on rank, duties, vessel type, route, and health details. Hindi ko po ma-guarantee approval here. Ano po ang role ninyo onboard?
must_not_do: Say all sea work is covered
trigger_phrases: Seafarer po ako. Usually onboard ako 8 months. Pwede ba ako kumuha ng life insurance?
I am a seafarer. I am usually onboard for 8 months. Can I get life insurance?

customer_situation: Seafarer asks whether life insurance works with ship-based work.
localized_response: Noted po. Engine crew and heavy equipment exposure may affect risk classification or requirements. It does not mean automatic decline, but advisor should pre-check with insurer. May recent medical exam result ba kayo from work?
must_not_do: Say all sea work is covered
response_goal: Uses occupational nuance and common seafarer documentation.
trigger_phrases: Engine crew ako, minsan heavy equipment area.
I am engine crew, sometimes in heavy equipment areas.

customer_situation: Seafarer asks whether life insurance works with ship-based work.
localized_response: Good po, PEME may help as supporting context if requested. I will summarize: seafarer engine crew, 8-month onboard cycle, heavy equipment exposure, with recent PEME available. Official requirements still need advisor or underwriting confirmation.
must_not_do: Say all sea work is covered
trigger_phrases: We have a pre-employment medical exam before boarding.

customer_situation: BPO night-shift employee worries about health and affordability.
localized_response: Night shift itself is not automatically a problem po, pero insurer may still ask about health, lifestyle, and work details during underwriting. Important lang na accurate ang disclosure. Are you looking for basic life cover or may critical illness rider din?
response_goal: Treats sector context without making assumptions.
trigger_phrases: BPO night shift ako. May effect ba iyon sa life insurance?
I work BPO night shift. Does that affect life insurance?

customer_situation: BPO night-shift employee worries about health and affordability.
localized_response: Makes sense po. If premium control is priority, basic protection-first coverage may be more suitable than adding many riders agad. We should set a monthly amount na kaya ninyong ituloy kahit may other bills.
trigger_phrases: Basic lang muna. Ayoko mataas premium.
Just basic coverage first. I do not want a high premium.

customer_situation: BPO night-shift employee worries about health and affordability.
localized_response: Noted po, 1500 monthly target. I can summarize this as BPO night-shift employee seeking basic life protection with affordable premium. Exact coverage and eligibility still depend on age, health answers, and insurer review.
response_goal: Gives a clean next step within constraints.
trigger_phrases: I can only afford around 1,500 pesos monthly.

customer_situation: Customer asks about grace period, lapse, and reinstatement in mixed English.
localized_response: Grace period is the allowed time after due date to pay without immediate full loss of policy status, depending on policy terms. Lapse means policy may no longer be active because payment was not made. Reinstatement is the process to restore a lapsed policy if allowed.
trigger_phrases: Ano difference ng grace period, lapse, and reinstatement?
What is the difference between grace period, lapse, and reinstatement?

customer_situation: Customer asks about grace period, lapse, and reinstatement in mixed English.
localized_response: The exact number of days is policy-specific, so I should not guess. Check the policy contract or servicing record. I can connect you to servicing to confirm the official grace-period rule for your policy.
trigger_phrases: How many days usually ang grace period?
How many days is the grace period usually?

customer_situation: Customer asks about grace period, lapse, and reinstatement in mixed English.
localized_response: Not always. Some policies may allow reinstatement with unpaid premiums, health declaration, or other requirements. But if reinstatement is not allowed or not completed, coverage may remain inactive. Official servicing needs to confirm your status.
response_goal: Answers with nuance and correct source of truth.
trigger_phrases: If lapsed na, start from zero ba?
If it is already lapsed, do I start from zero?

customer_situation: Customer uses ROI language for insurance.
localized_response: Good question po, pero life insurance should not be judged only by ROI. Main value is protection. If the plan has investment value, performance is not guaranteed and charges apply. Mutual funds and insurance have different purposes, so goal muna ang dapat linawin.
must_do: Warn not to judge only ROI
trigger_phrases: What is the ROI of this insurance? Mas mataas ba than mutual fund?
What is the ROI of this insurance? Is it higher than a mutual fund?

customer_situation: Customer uses ROI language for insurance.
localized_response: It depends on goal. If pure investment ang priority, compare investment products separately. If you need protection plus disciplined long-term funding, an insurance plan with fund value may be considered, but only after understanding charges, risks, and exclusions.
must_do: Warn not to judge only ROI
trigger_phrases: So hindi siya best for investment?
So it is not the best for investment?

customer_situation: Customer uses ROI language for insurance.
localized_response: That is clearer po. We can focus on protection amount, premium sustainability, beneficiaries, and claim conditions first. Then advisor can show protection-first options instead of investment-heavy designs.
must_do: Warn not to judge only ROI
trigger_phrases: Then I want protection muna, not investment.
Then I want protection first, not investment.

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and distrusts agents.
localized_response: Valid concern yan. Best way is not to rely on sales talk only. Ask for official proposal, benefit illustration, license or advisor details, product brochure, and policy terms. Kung hindi malinaw ang charges or exclusions, pause muna.
response_goal: Turns distrust into a verification process.
trigger_phrases: Bro, dami ko naririnig na agents puro sales talk. Paano ko malalaman legit?
I hear many agents only do sales talk. How do I know if it is legitimate?

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and distrusts agents.
localized_response: You do not need to sign habang hindi pa clear. Insurance is long-term, so dapat naiintindihan mo premium, benefits, exclusions, and cancellation rules. Okay lang humingi ng time to review.
trigger_phrases: What if pilitin ako mag-sign today?
What if they pressure me to sign today?

customer_situation: Customer uses casual Taglish and distrusts agents.
localized_response: Ask: What is guaranteed and not guaranteed? What are the charges? What are exclusions? What happens if I miss premium? How do claims work? Can I afford this for years? Can I see the official illustration?
trigger_phrases: Nice. Send me questions to ask.

customer_situation: Customer says they are too young for insurance.
localized_response: Gets ko. At 25, not everyone needs a big plan. But age can affect premium and insurability, so okay din mag-check early. May dependents, loan, or family na umaasa sa income mo?
response_goal: Avoids fear while explaining why age matters.
trigger_phrases: Parang bata pa ako for insurance, 25 pa lang ako.
I feel like I am too young for insurance. I am only 25.

customer_situation: Customer says they are too young for insurance.
localized_response: Then may protection need pa rin kahit wala pang kids. We can think about income replacement for parents and keep premium small enough na sustainable. Hindi kailangan malaking coverage agad.
trigger_phrases: Wala pang dependents, pero breadwinner ako sa parents.
I do not have dependents yet, but I am the breadwinner for my parents.

customer_situation: Customer says they are too young for insurance.
localized_response: Good. Basic protection-first option muna ang logical direction. Advisor can show official coverage choices, but we should avoid add-ons unless they fit your budget and goal.

customer_situation: Customer wants to complain about mis-selling.
localized_response: I am sorry to hear that po. I can route this as a complaint for review. Please give a short summary of what was promised versus what appears in the policy documents, but avoid sending full IDs or sensitive documents here.
must_not_do: Ask for private documents in chat
response_goal: Acknowledges complaint and starts a safe escalation.
trigger_phrases: I think na-mislead ako ng agent. Gusto ko mag-complain.
I think the agent misled me. I want to complain.

customer_situation: Customer wants to complain about mis-selling.
localized_response: Noted po: alleged promise of guaranteed fund value, but policy document appears to say otherwise. I cannot determine fault here, but this should be reviewed by the official complaints or compliance team with the relevant documents.
must_not_do: Ask for private documents in chat
response_goal: Avoids judgment while preserving the issue.
trigger_phrases: Sabi guaranteed daw ang fund value, pero sa document hindi.
They said the fund value was guaranteed, but the document does not say that.

customer_situation: Customer wants to complain about mis-selling.
localized_response: Yes po. I will mark this for human callback regarding possible mis-selling. Please share callback contact details only through the secure channel, and keep copies of proposal, messages, and policy documents for review.
must_not_do: Ask for private documents in chat
trigger_phrases: I want a human to call me.

customer_situation: Customer wants policy cancellation support from a human.
localized_response: Yes, I can route you to policy servicing. Before cancellation, a representative should explain possible loss of coverage, surrender value, charges, and alternatives. I cannot process cancellation directly in this chat.
response_goal: Handles cancellation as a formal servicing action.
trigger_phrases: I want to cancel my policy. Can I speak to a person?

customer_situation: Customer wants policy cancellation support from a human.
localized_response: I understand. I will include affordability as the reason for the servicing request. The team may explain options like reducing coverage, changing payment mode, or surrender, depending on policy rules.
trigger_phrases: I just cannot afford it anymore.

customer_situation: Customer wants policy cancellation support from a human.
localized_response: Noted. I will mark that you are requesting servicing support for affordability and prefer a non-sales servicing discussion. Final handling will follow the insurer's official process.
trigger_phrases: Okay, but no sales call please.

customer_situation: Customer reports a beneficiary dispute after death claim.
localized_response: Nakikiramay po ako. Dahil beneficiary dispute ito, kailangan po itong hawakan ng claims team or official servicing team. Hindi ako makakapagbigay ng decision dito, pero maaari kong i-escalate ang concern.
must_do: Recommend official documents only via secure channel
must_not_do: Request death certificate upload in chat
trigger_phrases: May dispute sa beneficiary ng death claim. Kailangan ko ng tao.
There is a dispute about the beneficiary for a death claim. I need a person.

customer_situation: Customer reports a beneficiary dispute after death claim.
localized_response: Naiintindihan ko po. I will summarize neutrally: claimant is child of insured, but records may show partner as beneficiary. The claims team must verify policy records, documents, and applicable process. Please submit documents only through official secure channels.
must_do: Recommend official documents only via secure channel
must_not_do: Request death certificate upload in chat
trigger_phrases: Ako ang anak pero partner niya ang nakalagay daw.
I am the child, but they say the partner is listed.

customer_situation: Customer reports a beneficiary dispute after death claim.
localized_response: Hindi ko po maaaring sabihin kung sino ang dapat tumanggap. That decision must come from the insurer's claims process and, if there is a legal dispute, qualified legal guidance. I can only route and summarize the case.
must_do: Recommend official documents only via secure channel
must_not_do: Request death certificate upload in chat
trigger_phrases: Can you tell me who should get the money?

customer_situation: Customer asks for a guaranteed investment return from insurance.
localized_response: I cannot say that po unless it is explicitly guaranteed in the official policy document, and most market-linked values are not guaranteed. We should check the official benefit illustration for guaranteed and non-guaranteed parts.
trigger_phrases: Can you say guaranteed 10 percent return para sure ako?
Can you say it has a guaranteed 10 percent return so I can be sure?

customer_situation: Customer asks for a guaranteed investment return from insurance.
localized_response: Verbal statements should be checked against the official proposal and policy wording. If there is a conflict, ask the advisor to explain in writing before paying or signing. Hindi po safe mag-base only sa promise.
response_goal: Moves from verbal promise to documented source.
trigger_phrases: But the agent said kikita talaga.
But the agent said it will really earn money.

customer_situation: Customer asks for a guaranteed investment return from insurance.
localized_response: Trust the official policy contract, benefit illustration, product brochure, and insurer-approved documents. If the wording is unclear, escalate to a licensed advisor or servicing team for clarification.

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to fill health answers for them.
localized_response: Hindi ko po maaaring sagutan ang health questions para sa inyo. Kailangan po ang applicant mismo ang sumagot nang totoo at accurate, dahil maaaring makaapekto ito sa approval, policy validity, or claims.
trigger_phrases: Ikaw na lang sumagot ng health questions para mabilis.
You answer the health questions for me so it is faster.

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to fill health answers for them.
localized_response: Pwede ko pong ipaliwanag ang meaning ng question in simple words, pero kayo pa rin po ang dapat magbigay ng answer based on your actual health history. Kung medical judgment ang kailangan, ask a qualified professional or advisor.
trigger_phrases: Hindi ko maintindihan ang iba, paano iyon?
I do not understand some of them. What should I do?

customer_situation: Customer asks the bot to fill health answers for them.
localized_response: Pre-existing condition generally means a health condition, symptom, diagnosis, or treatment that existed before the policy started, depending on policy wording. Exact definition can vary, so check the official policy and answer application questions honestly.
trigger_phrases: Okay, explain mo lang kung ano ang pre-existing condition.
Okay, just explain what a pre-existing condition means.

customer_situation: Customer uses provincial Tagalog phrasing and asks about premium affordability.
localized_response: Naiintindihan ko po. Mas mahalaga na kaya ninyong ituloy ang premium kaysa kumuha ng malaking plan na mapuputol. Magkano po ang comfortable na monthly hulog ninyo?
response_goal: Understands local wording like hulog for premium payment.
trigger_phrases: Ma'am, gusto ko sana kumuha ng insurance kaso baka di ko kayanin ang hulog buwan-buwan.
I want to get insurance, but I might not be able to afford the monthly payment.

customer_situation: Customer uses provincial Tagalog phrasing and asks about premium affordability.
localized_response: Okay po, 1,000 monthly. Pwede itong starting budget for basic protection discussion, but final coverage depends on age, health answers, and product rules. Hindi po kailangan pilitin ang mataas na premium.
trigger_phrases: Maybe just one thousand pesos for now.

customer_situation: Customer uses provincial Tagalog phrasing and asks about premium affordability.
localized_response: Walang judgment po. Kaya nga natin chine-check muna ang budget. If later mahirapan kayo, contact servicing early because missed premiums can affect coverage depending on policy rules.
trigger_phrases: Basta wag lang ako mapahiya pag di ko natuloy.
I just do not want to be embarrassed if I cannot continue it.

customer_situation: Bisaya-influenced customer asks about family coverage.
localized_response: Sige po, I understand na gusto ninyo ng insurance for family protection. We can start simple: sino ang dependents ninyo, ano ang budget range, and may existing insurance na ba kayo?
response_goal: Understands Bisaya-influenced input and replies safely in supported register.
trigger_phrases: Sir, ganahan ko insurance para sa akong pamilya, pero di ko kabalo asa magsugod.
I want insurance for my family, but I do not know where to start.

customer_situation: Bisaya-influenced customer asks about family coverage.
localized_response: Noted po: spouse and two children, and kayo ang main income earner. That means income protection is likely the priority. We should estimate coverage based on family expenses and what premium you can sustain.
response_goal: Maps regional wording to insurance need.
trigger_phrases: Asawa ug duha ka anak. Ako ra nagtrabaho.
My spouse and two children. I am the only one working.

customer_situation: Bisaya-influenced customer asks about family coverage.
localized_response: Yes po, dapat hindi mahal beyond budget. Better to start with protection-first coverage and avoid unnecessary riders until clear ang budget. Advisor can give official options after checking age and health details.
trigger_phrases: Just do not make it too expensive.

customer_situation: Ilocano-influenced customer asks if illness rider is needed.
localized_response: Yes po, I understand you are asking about illness protection. Some policies may offer critical illness or health-related riders, depending on product and underwriting. Ang priority ba ninyo ay critical illness benefit, hospitalization support, or accident coverage?
response_goal: Understands Ilocano-influenced input without unsafe imitation.
trigger_phrases: Adda ba rider para sakit? Gusto ko sana protection no agkasakitak.
Is there a rider for illness? I want protection if I get sick.

customer_situation: Ilocano-influenced customer asks if illness rider is needed.
localized_response: Noted po. Family history may be relevant, so it should be disclosed truthfully during application. I cannot give medical advice, but advisor can explain required health questions, exclusions, and waiting periods.
trigger_phrases: Critical illness siguro. May family history kami.
Maybe critical illness. We have family history.

customer_situation: Ilocano-influenced customer asks if illness rider is needed.
localized_response: Adding a rider can increase premium, but exact amount depends on age, coverage, health answers, and insurer pricing. Best po to request an official illustration with and without the rider to compare.
response_goal: Gives comparison method instead of guessing price.
trigger_phrases: Will the premium immediately become high?

customer_situation: Bicol-influenced customer asks about missed payment.
localized_response: Naiintindihan ko po, nagbayad kayo late at gusto ninyong malaman kung active pa ang policy. Kailangan itong i-check sa official servicing record, kasi depende sa due date, grace period, and posting date ng payment.
response_goal: Correctly handles regional phrasing and payment status uncertainty.
trigger_phrases: Nabayadan ko late, dai ko aram kung active pa ang policy.
I paid late, and I do not know whether the policy is still active.

customer_situation: Bicol-influenced customer asks about missed payment.
localized_response: Good po na may receipt kayo. Keep it as proof of payment. Still, active status depends on whether payment was posted within the allowed period. Servicing can verify using the official record.

customer_situation: Bicol-influenced customer asks about missed payment.
localized_response: Sige po. I will summarize: late payment made, receipt available, customer wants to confirm active policy status. Please share the receipt only through the secure servicing channel if requested.
trigger_phrases: Okay, I will just have it checked.

customer_situation: Customer uses mixed Filipino-English with provincial vocabulary for claim requirements.
localized_response: For claim requirements po, exact list depends on policy and claim type. Common documents may include claim form, proof of identity through official channel, policy details, and event-specific documents like medical or death documents. The insurer's claims team gives the final list.
trigger_phrases: Ano po mga papeles kailangan kung mag-claim ang pamilya?
What papers are needed if the family makes a claim?

customer_situation: Customer uses mixed Filipino-English with provincial vocabulary for claim requirements.
localized_response: Please do not send sensitive claim documents here. Use only official secure upload or servicing channels. I can help explain what each requirement means, but documents should go through the verified process.
trigger_phrases: Pwede ko ba i-send dito lahat para sure?
Can I send everything here to be sure?

customer_situation: Customer uses mixed Filipino-English with provincial vocabulary for claim requirements.
localized_response: Good idea po. Tell your spouse to keep policy records, advisor or servicing contact, payment receipts, and official claim instructions. Also make sure beneficiary details are updated through proper servicing while the policy is active.
trigger_phrases: Okay, gusto ko lang alam ng asawa ko process.
Okay, I just want my spouse to know the process.
